Tqt, grrt.ff. qat, rttryfi qd' mitr frilm tfufrrqfrrrr/4/3rsrrrnuT/1 s7l13l ftlEquft:-Trt^Aq3flins tfo 1offi) thra frftqrra, 2003 rrrfa *' {rGrqir,grfitrrur, rrTzrm, Eruit 4 if ftqiq,. 20 lr$, zoos 6t emrftrd rq {, qtm grsfiil*, ,iillfuil rfr Aq rrq tl hFa d'rrlm 3rnq.rdr 4430GU20t3 ( l ) -- 1 of 2 -- THE GAZETTEOF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY IPARrIII-SEC.4l MINISTRY OF FINANCE NOTIFICATION New Delhi,the 16thSeptember, 2013 No. NHB.HRD.PEN.0I/CMD|20I3.- In exerciseof the powersconferredby Section55 of the National HousingBank Act, 1987(53 of 1987),the Board,with the previousapprovalof the ReserveBank of India and in consultationwith the CentralGovernment,herebymakesthe following regulationsfurther to amend the National Flotrsing Bank(Employees') Pension Regulations,2003, namely:- l. (l) Theseregulationsmay be calledtheNationalHousingBank(Employees')Pension(Amendment)Regulations, 2013. (2) Theyshallbe deemedto havecomeinto forceon April l, 2010. 2. For sub-regulation(3), of Regulation3 of theNationalHousingBank(Employees')PensionRegulations,2003,the followingshallbe substituted,namely:- "(3) join the servicesof the Bankon or afterthenotifieddatebut beforeApril 0 I , 2010" R. V. VERMA, ChairmanandManagingDirector IADVT. llU4 lExty.l| 57/ l3l Note : The NationalHousingBank (Employees')PensionRegulations,2003 werepublishedin the Gazetteof India, Extraordinary,PartIII, Section4, datedMay 20,2003;whichhasnot beenamendedso far. -- 2 of 2 --
